## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] Documentation was updated when the public API changed
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, personal data or real order payloads were committed

## API compatibility

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Backward-compatible public API change
- [ ] Breaking change documented for the next major version
